title: Kill Chain: The Cyber War on America's Elections
original_title: Kill Chain: The Cyber War on America's Elections
overview: In advance of the 2020 Presidential election, Kill Chain: The Cyber War on America's Elections takes a deep dive into the weaknesses of today's election technology, investigating the startling vulnerabilities in America's voting systems and the alarming risks they pose to our democracy.
